question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/transaction/RecordItem.java -> Scope: Critical: Unintended permanent freezing of funds'] [Function: parseSuccess()] Can an unprivileged user craft a child TokenFreeze transaction whose parent RecordItem has a failed status, causing parseSuccess() to return false and silently skip the unfreeze handler, leaving the account permanently frozen with no recovery path?
